name: tokenized-equities-demo
description: Demo app for SEC-compliant tokenized equities (April 2026 regulatory change)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
